pageDescription: Calculate your daily protein needs based on activity level, goals, and body weight for muscle building, maintenance, and overall health

activityLevels.veryActive: Extremely Active (very hard exercise & physical job)

function.title: Protein Function
function.description: Essential for muscle building and repair, enzyme production, and hormone synthesis

sources.title: Protein Sources
sources.description: Complete proteins (animal products) and incomplete proteins (plant sources)

recommendations.title: Dietary Recommendations
recommendations.description: 0.8g per kg for sedentary adults, up to 2.2g per kg for athletes

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides nutritional estimates only
criticalWarningsList.individual: Protein needs vary based on individual factors and health conditions

importantNotesList: Athletes and active individuals may require higher protein intake
Spread protein intake throughout the day for optimal muscle protein synthesis
Consider protein quality and amino acid profile when selecting sources
Excessive protein intake may strain kidneys in susceptible individuals

messages.enterInformation: Enter your information to calculate protein needs
messages.resultMessage: Your daily protein needs are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides protein intake estimates based on general nutritional guidelines. Individual needs may vary based on health conditions, medications, and specific dietary requirements.

seekHelp.title: Nutritional Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized nutrition advice and dietary planning, consult registered dietitians or healthcare professionals with expertise in nutritional science and individual health needs.

errors.heightCm: Please enter valid height in cm
errors.proteinPreference: Please select a protein intake preference

tooltips.age: Age affects metabolic rate and protein requirements
tooltips.activityLevel: Your regular activity level affects protein needs
tooltips.goal: Your fitness goal determines protein recommendations
tooltips.proteinPreference: Selected preference affects protein intake level
